title: Porcelain Bowls, 500ml Blue Cereal Bowls, Rice Bowls, Salad Bowls, Dishwasher, Microwave & Oven Safe,11.5x6.5cm(2 Pack)
features: √Unique& Stylish Design- Blue porcelain cereal bowls look stylish and fantastic on the table. Suitable for different styles of table. The beautiful colors create a beautiful tablescape for any occasion.
√Easy Stack& Clean& Dry- Porcelain bowls fit for microwave, oven, dishwasher and fridge safe. Ideal for even the busiest kitchen.
√Sturdy & Safe Material - These bowls are PROUDLY FDA approved and made of Sturdy porcelain, a type of premium LEAD and NON-TOXIC ceramic, chip-resistant and more sturdy than stoneware.

√Perfect Size for Dinner- 11.5 x 6.5 cm, enough to use for cooking hot cereals or oatmeal in the microwave without overflowing. Great uses for soup, entree, pasta, ramen, noodle, ice cream, salad and more.

√【Please Note】: Even if our box is very thick, it is difficult to avoid the occasional breakage of the porcelain during shipping because the porcelain is fragile, if you encounter any damage, please contact us immediately. Although the logistics situation is uncontrollable, but we will do our best to provide you with a better solution to your problems.
description: Product Description CSYY has always been specializing in making porcelain products. If you don't want to stick to the immutable porcelain in the process of meticulous treatment of food, then our Starlight series of products will make you excited. The porcelain is thick and adopted retro kiln glaze technology, three-dimensional vertical stripes are outlined, and every detail is full of artistic conception. If you like starry sky elements, CSYY is your best choice. Note: The item was taken in kind for the light, angle, display and other objective reasons, there is a slight color difference, please understand. Small Cereal Bowls The cereal bowl is 500ml/18oz，best for rice, noodle, soup, salad, dessert, fruit and so on. It is also a gift for christmas, party. Thick and Safe Porcelain These cereal bowls are made of durable, thick ceramic. Smooth and smooth material makes it comfortable to touch. Lead free, non-toxic, beautiful and durable Practical and Durable to Use The porcelain plates can be used in the oven, microwave and freezer making this range tough enough for everyday and stunning enough for best. About color The change of the glaze from the oven to the glaze is uncontrollable. During the firing process, the fine temperature difference and the amount of glazing will affect the color distribution. The same group of products will also appear blue, green, gray, a variety of changes.
